===================
===================
=== Bob Dylan July 17 1981 Loreley soundcheck.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan
Freileichtbhne
Loreley, West Germany
17 July 1981 soundcheck

Another installment in this intermittent series of 1981 Dylan soundchecks. This one is in much better sound quality than previous uploads; the music is often clear and well-defined, although the performances are, as is often the case with soundchecks, partial/incomplete/etc. And the taper probably isn't even inside the arena; there's the expected (maybe a bit less than expected) conversation. background noise, etc.

This is particularly interesting for the nonstandard lyrics Dylan sings on "Gotta Serve Somebody," including "You may be Adolf Hitler," a phrase I don't think Dylan ever sang in concert. (He certainly didn't sing it at the actual show, where he skipped the song entirely, as he did at all but one of the 1981 German concerts.

Original notes follow:

Soundcheck; has clipping which can be heard badly on t4 and t5; has background talking and dog barking and traffic; good sound [C]


static t1 0:02 to 0:05, 1:14 plus a few more occasionally


1.Blowin' In The Wind
2.I Believe In You
3.I Believe In You
4.Gotta Serve Somebody
5.Gotta Serve Somebody 
===================
===================
===================
